markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential SEO and content marketing partnership between GrowthX and BoostMySchool.](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and SEO services, with two engagement levels: $9k/month (100k+ words) and $5k/month startup package](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [BoostMySchool is considering SEO investment for Q4, but has concerns about targeting their niche audience (private K-12 school fundraisers)](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Marcel proposed next steps: Hudson to consider GrowthX workshop, continue discussions, and potentially align for Q4 engagement](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Background and Offerings

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, leveraging experience from IBM, HP, Hashicorp, Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows + expert editors to produce high-volume, quality content at \~$0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Standard engagement: $9k/month, 100k+ words, hands-on approach](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [New startup package: $5k/month, lower volume, more async communication](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

### BoostMySchool Context

  - [Seed-stage startup focused on private K-12 school fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [11-person team with limited marketing resources (Hudson as solo marketer)](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Currently prioritizing sales-driven growth due to relationship-based industry](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### SEO Strategy and Concerns

  - [GrowthX approach: Start broad for authority, then target high-intent keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Use AI for keyword research, content creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [BoostMySchool concerns: Ensuring content targets their niche audience effectively](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Challenge: Balancing broad traffic growth with qualified lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Extensive keyword analysis and clustering (e.g., 55k keywords for Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [AI-generated outlines, titles, and user intent analysis](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Human editors for quality control, fact-checking, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)

### Measuring Success

  - [Traffic growth (e.g., 24x for DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Increased brand searches (3.2x for DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Building audience through newsletters or other channels (e.g., AImines.com)](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Slack invite and additional details](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
  - [Hudson to review GrowthX workshop information ($500, 5-hour session)](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
  - [GrowthX team to conduct further research on BoostMySchool's market](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [Regroup in a few weeks to discuss potential Q4 engagement](https://fathom.video/share/YJLthmQ7SAsYB4_bdL3mxoy6UzpA7Pxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
